source: TikTok Shop Seller Center (public docs) + seller community reports (2025-2026). Fees evolve frequently — verify before pricing decisions.

paymentProcessingFee.note: Charged by payment processor (e.g. Stripe, Adyen). TikTok Shop may add this on top of base commission.

afffFundFee.note: Application Fund Fee — TikTok's separate platform fee for hosting the listing infrastructure. NOT the same as the 8% commission.

creatorCommission.note: Seller-set commission rate paid to TikTok creators/affiliates. Affiliate fee is ON TOP of the base 8% commission.

fully_managed.label: Fully managed (FBM→TikTok)
fully_managed.sellerResponsibility: Ship bulk to TikTok consolidation warehouse

disclaimer: TikTok Shop fees change frequently. The 8% base commission, 1.8% payment processing, 2% AFFF, and 1-2% cross-border fees are consistent with public 2025-2026 documentation, but specific rates for your category and seller region may differ. Always confirm in TikTok Seller Center.
